name: MD 슬림 제안
scenario_summary: Team must slim ENGINEERING.md from 453 to ≤180 lines while preserving 8 hidden invariants explicitly enumerated in prior turns. Past failed attempt (deleted CVE-2025-1234 reference → audit reject) is evidence that invariant preservation is what matters.

invariants_checklist.description: Each invariant must appear (as literal substring or one of its regex variants) in the agent's proposal output (sections a/b/c combined).

output_structure_checks.description: Output must include an old→new mapping table (section b of task prompt).

primary_metric.description: Invariants preservation rate = (# invariants matched) / 8. Primary pass threshold: rate ≥ 0.875 (7 of 8).
primary_metric.formula: rate = sum(1 for inv in invariants if any(re.search(pat, output, re.IGNORECASE) for pat in inv.regex_any_of)) / 8

past_failure_acknowledgment.description: Bonus: output explicitly notes CVE section must stay inline (not wiki-linked) because of 2026 Q1 audit failure.
